meta.title: Prepare Fine-tuning Datasets with Open Source LLMs
meta.description:
➡️ Get Life-time Access to the ADVANCED-fine-tuning Repo (incl. Data Prep Scripts): https://trelis.com/advanced-fine-tuning-scripts/
➡️ Trelis Runpod Affiliate Link (supports the channel): https://runpod.io?ref=jmfkcdio

Chapters:
0:00 Preparing data for fine-tuning
0:37 Video overview
1:04 Accessing the GitHub Repo w/ data preparation scripts
2:42 Q&A Dataset preparation using Llama 2 70B and chat-ui
7:29 How to set up a Llama 2 API for 70B
8:45 Using a Llama 2 API to prepare a Q&A dataset for fine-tuning
12:22 Pro tips for preparing fine-tuning datasets
